description_long: This is a peaked cap, commonly associated with military or police uniforms, featuring a wide, flat, and stiff black brim that extends outward. The crown is flat-topped and circular, covered in black fabric with a subtle texture, and bordered by a thin red piping. The band around the base of the crown is deep red, accented with gold buttons on the sides and a prominent circular insignia at the front center. The underside of the brim and the interior band are also black, providing a sharp contrast to the red band. The overall construction suggests a structured, formal hat designed for authority figures, with a focus on durability and visual distinction.
description: A formal peaked cap with a flat black top, red band, gold buttons, and a central insignia, typical of military or police uniforms.
description_view_0: The top view shows the flat, circular black crown with subtle texture and a thin red edge.
description_view_1: This angled side view highlights the wide, flat brim, the red band, and a gold button on the side.
description_view_2: The front view displays the red band, central insignia, and the full width of the flat brim.
description_view_3: Another angled side view, similar to view 1, showing the brim, red band, and gold button from the opposite side.
